chapter.label: Tale 191
chapter.title: A Brief Life Of Saint John Chrysostom, Patriarch Of Constantinople

paragraphs.text: It was said of Saint John of Constantinople, justly koown as Chrysostom =golden mouth for the purity and the brilliance of his teaching and the splendour of his eloquence, that from the day he received the salutary sacrament of baptism, he neither swore nor required anybody else to swear, nor fied, nor spoke, nor listened to witty words.
